summary: Comprehensive testing of KiteAlgo Optimizer feature completed successfully. All backend optimizer APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend optimizer page fully functional with heatmap visualization, parameter configuration, and results display.
passed_tests: POST /api/optimizer/run with parameter ranges returns valid heatmap data
GET /api/optimizer/results returns list of past optimizations
GET /api/optimizer/results/{id} returns full optimization detail
Large parameter grid correctly rejected (>2500 combinations)
Optimizer page loads from /optimizer route with sidebar navigation
Configuration panel with all inputs working (strategy, symbol, dates, capital, quantity)
Parameter range cards with min/max/step inputs and live combination counter
Add Parameter button working to add custom parameter ranges
Remove Parameter button working to remove parameter ranges
Run Optimizer button executes optimization and shows results
Best Parameters Found banner displays winning parameters and return %
Heatmap renders with color-coded cells (green=best, red=worst)
Heatmap metric selector changes between Return %, Sharpe, Win Rate, Drawdown
Heatmap tooltip shows cell details on hover
Full Results table shows all combinations sortable by columns
Previous Optimizations table loads past results and Load buttons work
Strategy change from SMA to ORB updates parameter ranges dynamically
User can customize parameter ranges and run with custom values
Symbol dropdown working with multiple symbols
Date range inputs working correctly
Capital and quantity inputs accepting values
Heatmap visualization with proper color scaling and legends
Results tabs (Heatmap/Full Results) switching correctly
